name: LAST GAME STUDIO TOKEN
description: A next-generation GameFi token built on Binance Smart Chain (BSC), designed to power a decentralized gaming ecosystem with play-to-earn mechanics, NFT integration, competitive rewards, and community-driven governance. The token enables seamless in-game transactions, staking opportunities, tournament rewards, and exclusive access to premium gaming features. Focused on scalability, low transaction fees, and player ownership, this project bridges blockchain technology with immersive gaming experiences for both casual and competitive players.
